name: Alhambra Palace
description: The stunning Moorish palace and fortress complex. A must-see cultural site.

name: Calle Navas Tapas Crawl
description: A street famous for traditional tapas bars and local beer.

name: Mae West Club
description: One of the most famous nightclubs in Granada for dancing until dawn.

name: Mirador de San Nicolas
description: A free viewpoint with a spectacular sunset view of the Alhambra.
